{{CargoClone
|name=Minister Cao Cao
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=123
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Refine +1 Green Rebel Material +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Minion Healing B-tad Cost -1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Minion Healing B-tad Cost -2%
|}}
